notesGeneral:
WEATHER GUIDELINES    With the threat of inclement weather in the forecast for this weekend's DCI Eastern Classic, here are some safety protocols being instituted for the show. DCI will be monitoring conditions with professional weather forecasters to ensure your safety.

RAIN    Umbrellas are not allowed in the stadium. Please use individual rain gear or ponchos. You may also consider bringing a small towel to wipe off a potentially wet bleacher seat.
 
LIGHTNING / DAMAGING WINDS    DCI safety protocol requires stadium evacuation when lightning or damaging winds are anticipated, or close enough to be dangerous to performers and spectators. Note that the announcement may occur with clear skies overhead to allow time for a safe evacuation. In the event that an evacuation becomes necessary, you will be instructed to leave the stadium and return to your vehicles. Vehicles provide safe refuge from lightning storms.
 
ALL-CLEAR    DCI will use social media to post an all-clear message (Facebook & Twitter). You will have ample time to re-enter the stadium before the performances resume.
 
REMINDER    Please follow all safety instructions from the stadium announcer!
 
The participating corps and DCI will do everything we can to ensure the show goes on! We are grateful for your support of the world’s greatest marching music performers.
